_description: Blueprint for feature development teams. Use with TeamCreate or /kickoff.
_workflow: Sequential: architect → implementer → tester → lead review gate

roles.name: lead
roles.role: Coordinator — breaks down the feature, assigns tasks, reviews final output

roles.name: architect
roles.role: Plans implementation using .claude/agents/architect.md. Read-only. Produces file list and sequence.

roles.name: implementer
roles.role: Writes code following the architect's plan. Creates slices, routes, services, repos.

roles.name: tester
roles.role: Writes and runs tests using .claude/agents/tester.md. Co-located test files.
